exampleSurfaces: examples/basic-usage uses shared MockupPreviewControls and MockupPreviews
docs and Seraph previews now consume shared extracted primitives through the same runtime path
fixesApplied: Promoted multiple previously page-local surfaces into reusable kit APIs: Seraph specimen plate, staggered Seraph ledger/proof band, and Codex docs code figure.
Extended code and diff surfaces with richer file-level metadata framing and improved Storybook control coverage for broader docs/chat/mock reuse.

Extracted the mockup gallery control panel into a shared MockupPreviewControls component, moved its styling into shared package CSS, and rewired the example app to consume the shared control surface instead of duplicating local UI.
residualRisks: Further gains from here would be incremental breadth work rather than closing a current reuse blocker.
Dark-mode hierarchy remains largely CSS-vocabulary driven, but the extracted surfaces preserve existing theme-aware behavior and did not introduce new obvious contrast regressions.
